experience.title: Director of Operations
responsibilities: Oversaw daily operations for a mid-sized healthcare provider with a focus on improving patient care delivery.
Collaborated with senior management to develop and implement operational strategies improving efficiency by 15%.
Managed financial reporting and budgeting processes ensuring alignment with organizational goals.
Led a team of 30 operational staff, fostering a culture of performance improvement.

experience.title: Operations Manager
responsibilities: Implemented Lean methodologies to streamline clinic operations, reducing patient wait times by 20%.
Conducted regular audits to ensure compliance with healthcare regulations and standards.
Developed and maintained relationships with stakeholders including patients, staff, and community partners.
